subcodes.first_line: I addressed unto thee aforetime an Epistle in the lucid Arabian tongue
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلت الیک من قبل کتابا علی لسان عربی مبین و اذا انزل علیک  هذاللوح
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @differences in human capacity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @love of God
